sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Test if clicking toggles bars on/off
# Click on a removed bar at row 33, col 39
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 39}])
print(f"Click removed bar row 33 col 39: level_completed={result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check what changed
curr_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
prev_ascii = previous_frame.ascii.split('\n') if previous_frame else None

print("\nRight side row 33 before/after:")
if prev_ascii:
    print(f"  Before: {prev_ascii[33][33:57]}")
print(f"  After:  {curr_ascii[33][33:57]}")

# Check if the bar toggled
if prev_ascii and curr_ascii[33][33:57] != prev_ascii[33][33:57]:
    print("  Bar toggled!")
else:
    print("  Bar did NOT toggle")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
